home.title: Upload Any Report
home.subtitle: Instantly Simulate the Future
home.description: Even with just a piece of text, MiroFish can automatically generate a parallel world with up to millions of Agents based on the reality seeds within. Inject variables through a god's-eye view and find the 'local optimum' in dynamic environments through complex group interactions.
home.slogan: Let the future be rehearsed in Agent clusters, let decisions prevail after a hundred battles

status.title: System Status
status.description: Prediction engine on standby. Upload multiple unstructured data files to initialize the simulation sequence.

metrics.highAvailabilityDesc: Up to millions of Agent simulation

1.title: Graph Construction
1.desc: Reality seed extraction & Individual and group memory injection & GraphRAG construction

2.title: Environment Setup
2.desc: Entity relationship extraction & Profile generation & Environment config Agent injection

3.title: Start Simulation
3.desc: Dual-platform parallel simulation & Auto-parse prediction requirements & Dynamic temporal memory update

4.title: Report Generation
4.desc: ReportAgent with rich toolset for deep interaction with post-simulation environment

5.title: Deep Interaction
5.desc: Chat with any individual in the simulated world & Chat with ReportAgent

upload.title: 01 / Reality Seeds
upload.placeholder: // Enter simulation or prediction requirements in natural language (e.g., What public sentiment trend will occur if Wuhan University announces disciplinary revocation?)

ontology.title: Ontology Generation
ontology.description: LLM analyzes document content and simulation requirements, extracts reality seeds, and automatically generates appropriate ontology structure

graphRag.title: GraphRAG Construction
graphRag.description: Based on generated ontology, documents are automatically chunked and Zep is called to build knowledge graph, extracting entities and relationships, and forming temporal memory and community summaries

complete.title: Construction Complete
complete.description: Graph construction completed, please proceed to next step for simulation environment setup

simulationInit.title: Simulation Instance Initialization
simulationInit.description: Create simulation instance and load simulation world parameter template

agentProfiles.title: Generate Agent Profiles
agentProfiles.description: Combining context, automatically call tools to sort out entities and relationships from knowledge graph, initialize simulation individuals, and assign unique behaviors and memories based on reality seeds

platformConfig.title: Generate Dual-Platform Simulation Config
platformConfig.description: LLM intelligently sets world time flow rate, recommendation algorithm, individual active time periods, speech frequency, event triggers, etc. based on simulation requirements and reality seeds

orchestration.title: Initial Activation Orchestration
orchestration.description: Based on narrative direction, automatically generate initial activation events and hot topics to guide the initial state of the simulated world

ready.title: Ready to Start
ready.description: Simulation environment preparation complete, ready to start simulation
ready.recommendation: For first-time runs, strongly recommend switching to 'Custom Mode' to reduce simulation rounds for quick preview
ready.agentScale: If Agent scale is 100: estimated time {minutes} min

panels.latestFacts: Latest key facts from temporal memory

tools.insightForgeDesc: Align real-world seed data with simulation environment state, combining Global/Local Memory mechanisms for cross-temporal deep attribution analysis
tools.panoramaSearchDesc: Breadth-first traversal algorithm based on graph structure to reconstruct event propagation paths and capture full information flow topology
tools.quickSearchDesc: GraphRAG-based instant query interface optimized for index efficiency, used for quickly extracting specific node attributes and discrete facts
tools.agentSurveyDesc: Structured questionnaire tool, autonomously determines survey objects and sends questionnaires to multiple Agents in simulation environment for parallel collection

interaction.title: Deep Interaction
interaction.chatWithAgent: Chat with any individual in the world
interaction.reportAgentDesc: Quick chat version of report generation agent, can call 4 professional tools, has complete MiroFish memory

persona.eventExperienceDesc: Complete behavior trajectory in this event
persona.behaviorProfileDesc: Experience summary and behavioral style preferences
persona.memoryMarkDesc: Memories formed based on reality seeds

graphPanel.title: Graph Relationship Visualization
graphPanel.graphRagMemoryUpdating: GraphRAG short/long-term memory updating in real-time
graphPanel.processingHint: Some content is still being processed, manual refresh recommended later
graphPanel.name: Name
graphPanel.label: Label

history.title: Simulation Records
history.playbackHint: Step 3 'Start Simulation' and Step 5 'Deep Interaction' need to be launched during runtime and do not support historical playback
